title: UCP-1 Immunohistochemical Protocol
author: Bianca Hemmeryckx
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.j9scr6e
materials: 10 min 1x TBS (37°C)*10x Tris-buffered-saline (TBS): - 200 ml Tris-HCl pH 7.5 1 M - 600 ml NaCl 5 M - 8 ml Tween - Stir- Add AD to 2,000 ml *1x TBS: mix 100 ml 10x TBS with 900 ml AD Tween 20 Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P1379-500ml

7 min Trypsin 37°C 2% solution in Trypsin buffer (dilution 1/80) Trypsin buffer (1L): -50 ml 1 M Tris-HCl pH 7.8 (0.05 M)-30 ml 5 M NaCl (0.15 M)-1g CaCl 2 (0.1%)-Dissolve in 800 ml AD-Add AD to 1L Trypsin from porcine pancreas Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #T7409
Peroxidase Block: 200 ml methanol + 600 µl H 2 O 2 30% (add just before slides go into methanol solution) Hydrogen peroxide 30% Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore) Catalog #822287.1000
Overnight polyclonal rabbit anti-murine UCP-1 1:200 dilution in TNB at room temperature Polyclonal rabbit anti-mouse UCP-1 antibody Abcam Catalog #ab10983

45 min goat anti-rabbit-biotin couped secondary antibody 1/300 + 10% pre-immune mouse serum (all diluted in TNB) Polyclonal Goat Anti-Rabbit Immunoglobulins/Biotinylated * 1 ml Contributed by users Catalog #E043201 Mouse serum Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M5905-10ML

DAB (200 ml 1x TRIS + 65 µl H 2 O 2 30% added fresh)-Transfer a small amount of DAB to a 0.4 - 0.7 ml microcentrifuge tube (fill only the cone)-Add DAB to cilinder containing 200 ml TRIS-Put parafilm on top of cilinder and seal it-Mix solution by hand until most of the DAB is dissolved-Filter-Pour solution into designated container for slides-Add H 2 O 2 to solution just before use. 3,3-DIAMINOBENZIDINE.4HCl.xH2O Pure 98% * 5 g Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #32750-5G

steps.title: 45 min pre-immune goat serum 1/5...
steps.instruction: 45 min pre-immune goat serum 1/5 in TNB TNB (1L):-100 ml 1 M Tris-HCl pH 7.5 (0.1 M)-30 ml 5 M NaCl (0.15 M)-5g blocking reagent (0.5%) from TSA BT kit Pre-immune goat serum Contributed by users Catalog #X090710 TSA BT amplification kit Perkin Elmer Catalog #NEL700001

steps.title: 3 x 5 min TNT TNT...
steps.instruction: 3 x 5 min TNT TNT (1L):-100 ml 1 M Tris-HCl pH 7.5 (0.1 M)-30 ml 5 M NaCl (0.15 M)-0.4 ml Tween-20 (0.04%)

steps.title: 30 min streptavidin-coupled peroxidase (PO) 1/100...
steps.instruction: 30 min streptavidin-coupled peroxidase (PO) 1/100 in TNB (reagent found in TSA BT kit)

steps.title: 8 min biotinyl tyramide (BT) 1/50...
steps.instruction: 8 min biotinyl tyramide (BT) 1/50 diluted in amplification diluent (both reagents supplied in TSA BT kit)

steps.title: 3 x 5 min 1x TRIS...
steps.instruction: 3 x 5 min 1x TRIS 10x TRIS (1L):-500 ml 1M Tris-HCl pH 7.5-500 ml AD 1x TRIS (1L):-100 ml 10x TRIS-900 ml AD

steps.title: Harris Hematoxylin 5 sec Solution:-100 ml...
steps.instruction: Harris Hematoxylin 5 sec Solution:-100 ml Harris Hematoxylin-100 ml AD-2 ml glacial acetic acid Harris Hematoxylin GURR® mercury free 1L VWR International (Avantor) Catalog #351945S

steps.title: Mount coverslip with DPX DPX Merck...
steps.instruction: Mount coverslip with DPX DPX Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore) Catalog #1.00579.0500
